# Onboarding lift read

## TL;DR

Removing friction step F caused the +2.1pp lift in voluntary
conversion.

## Body

After step F was removed, voluntary conversion moved from 18.4% to
20.5% week-over-week. The lift is attributable to the F removal
because no other change shipped in that window.

## Methodology

Pre/post comparison with no control arm.
